_comment: Example MCP config for Godot Engine integration. This is a template - you need to install a compatible Godot MCP server first.
_tools_provided: godot_run_scene - Run a scene in the Godot editor
godot_get_scene_tree - Read the current scene tree
godot_export - Export the project for a platform
_setup_instructions: 1. Install a Godot MCP server: npm install -g godot-mcp-server
2. Set GODOT_PATH to your Godot 4 binary
3. Set PROJECT_PATH to your Godot project root
4. Add this config to your Claude Code MCP settings
